hero.subtitle: The Only Tracking App You'll Ever Need
hero.heading: Track Your Progress
hero.description: Gym workouts, outdoor activities, habits, notes, to-dos, and more. {{appName}} keeps everything organized in one place — your life, your way.

phone.heading: Just Your Phone. That's It.
phone.description: No extra devices, no additional apps. {{appName}} uses your phone's built-in sensors to track everything — GPS, steps, motion, and more. Install and start tracking in seconds.
phone.sync: All your data is securely stored in the cloud and synced between the mobile app and web. Switch devices, never lose your progress.
phone.multitask: Use the full app while tracking. Write notes, check your to-dos, chat with friends — all without stopping your session.

simplicity.heading: Built for Simplicity
simplicity.description: Intuitive design that gets out of your way. Focus on what matters — your progress.
simplicity.intuitiveDesc: Your sessions organize themselves as you go. Pin favorites to the top for quick access
simplicity.navigationDesc: Swipe between pages, tap to explore — everything flows naturally
simplicity.editDesc: Everything you create is fully editable afterwards. Auto-save keeps your changes safe as you go
simplicity.allInOneDesc: Gym, activities, notes, habits, chat, and more — all in a single app

activities.heading: Track Every Activity
activities.description: Running, cycling, hiking, or just a walk — {{appName}} tracks it all with precision.
activities.gpsDesc: Real-time tracking with interactive maps and route visualization
activities.statsDesc: Distance, pace, calories, steps, moving time, duration — all tracked automatically
activities.templatesDesc: Save favorite routes and sessions, review your complete history anytime
activities.shareDesc: Create beautiful, fully customizable images of your sessions and share them with friends

multitask.heading: Full App Access During Sessions
multitask.description: Your session keeps running in the background. Write notes, check your to-dos, chat with friends — all without stopping your tracking.

analytics.heading: Powerful Analytics
analytics.description: See your progress, hit your goals. Detailed insights across everything you track.
analytics.chartsDesc: Visualize your improvement over days, weeks, months, and years
analytics.recordsDesc: Automatically track your best results and celebrate milestones
analytics.reportsDesc: Generate weekly, monthly, and quarterly summaries of all your data
analytics.goalsDesc: Set personal goals and track your progress toward achieving them

nutrition.heading: Track What You Eat
nutrition.description: Log meals, scan barcodes, and hit your daily calorie and macro goals — all built in.
nutrition.barcodeDesc: Scan any product barcode on mobile and instantly log its nutrition info
nutrition.searchDesc: Search from millions of foods across USDA and Open Food Facts databases
nutrition.trackingDesc: Set daily goals for calories, protein, carbs, and fat — track your progress with a visual ring
nutrition.mealsDesc: Save your go-to meals and log them with a single tap next time

social.heading: Share Your Journey
social.description: Connect with friends, share your sessions, and celebrate achievements together.
social.shareDesc: Post your sessions to the social feed for friends to see
social.likeDesc: Engage with your friends' achievements and keep each other going
social.friendsDesc: Connect with friends and follow each other's progress
social.feedDesc: See what your friends are up to with a real-time feed

chat.heading: Stay Connected
chat.description: Full-featured chat built right in. Share your progress without leaving the app.
chat.messagesDesc: Instant messaging with typing indicators and delivery status
chat.mediaDesc: Share photos and videos directly in your conversations
chat.voiceDesc: Record and send voice messages when typing isn't enough
chat.shareSessionsDesc: Send session summaries directly to friends in chat

habits.heading: Build Better Habits
habits.description: Create daily habits and let {{appName}} handle the rest. Step goals, timed habits, and reminders — everything works automatically.
habits.stepsDesc: Set a daily step goal and it's automatically marked done when you reach it
habits.timedDesc: Track duration-based habits that complete automatically when your time is up
habits.remindersDesc: Set reminders for each habit so you never forget — normal or priority alerts
habits.streaksDesc: Track your current and longest streaks, completion rates, and monthly progress

reminders.heading: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Reminders built into every feature. Stay on track with your habits, activities, and goals.
reminders.statement: Set global reminders that notify you on every device, or local ones for just your phone. Priority alerts break through with full-screen notifications. Reminders are built into every feature — habits, activities, and more.

notifications.heading: Never Miss a Moment
notifications.description: Live push notifications keep you in the loop. Friend requests, new comments, messages — delivered instantly. Add home screen widgets to see your steps and jump straight into logging weight, adding notes, or starting a gym session with a single tap.

cta.heading: Ready to Start Tracking?
cta.description: Join {{appName}} today and keep everything organized in one place.

navbar.loginNote: Same account works on mobile & web
